name: Joel Stains Pilli
headline: Your headline (e.g., Senior Product Manager · B2B SaaS)
summary: After leading operations and working across different industries, I’ve learned that successful projects really come down to clear communication and the ability to adapt when things change. I’m comfortable connecting big-picture ideas to the day-to-day work, turning messy goals into plans that teams can actually follow. Whether it’s a nonprofit initiative or an ad campaign, I focus on delivering results that make sense and move things forward. I’m looking to bring that same practical, organized approach to a team that values thoughtful execution.
